system.description:
You are a landholder who holds some sort of authority over its land, and you learnt how to wield this authority as efficiently as possible, making you a beacon of rulership. You gain the following benefits:

  • When your stronghold would give you a bonus to one of your abilities, you can always choose to increase your charisma.

  • You gain a free follower for every 50 staff you have, instead of 100. Every 100 staff you have, you may choose a free follower which is not on the list of your stronghold.

  • You reduce any cost to upgrade your stronghold by a percentage equal to your prestige rating.
